200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

The fighter burns continuously, dealing 24000 damage around himself every second.

description 4/6

The fighter burns continuously, dealing 32000 damage around himself every second. When the fighter has dealt 120000 damage, he charges his weapon and increases the damage of his next attack by 150000. This attack sends out shards that deal 100000 damage to three random enemies.

description 6/6

The fighter burns continuously, dealing 50000 damage around himself every second. When the fighter has dealt 200000 damage, he charges his weapon and increases the damage of his next attack by 250000. this attack sends out shards that deal 150000 damage to three random enemies. Once in a while, on death, delivers a crushing blow, dealing damage equal to 200% of the Annihilator’s max health distributed among all enemies.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The flames around Annihilator are amplified, and all enemies in a large radius around the unit take an additional 24000 physical damage.

description 4/6

The flames around Annihilator are amplified, and all enemies in a large radius around the unit take an additional 32000 physical damage. Shards that fly after the Annihilator’s charged attack set enemies on fire. The burning unit’s take 150000 damage and have their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

description 6/6

The flames around Annihilator are amplified, and all enemies in a large radius around the unit take an additional 50000 physical damage. Shards that fly after the Annihilator’s charged attack set enemies on fire. The burning unit’s take 150000 damage and have their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec. When the Annihilator deals a crushing blow, all enemies take an additional 100000 physical damage.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Each second, the unit has a 50% chance to gain a shield that absorbs 1 damage.

description 4/6

Each second, the unit has a 50% chance to gain a shield that absorbs 1 damage. Annihilator’s physical armor increases by 10% of the amount of damage dealt by the shards created by the Annihilator’s charged attack.

description 6/6

Each second, the unit has a 50% chance to gain a shield that absorbs 1 damage. Annihilator’s physical armor increases by 10% of the amount of damage dealt by the shards created by the Annihilator’s charged attack. Once in a while, when Annihilator dies, all allies gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to 30% of the Annihilator’s max health. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for up to 5 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

All enemies that take damage from Annihilator’s flames have a 25% chance to catch fire. The burning units take 50000 damage and have their healing rate reduced by 15% for 2 sec.

description 4/6

All enemies that take damage from Annihilator’s flames have a 33% chance to catch fire. The burning units take 50000 damage and have their healing rate reduced by 15% for 2 sec. Steals 75% physical and magic armor from enemies hit by shards created by the Annihilator’s charged attack for 5 sec.

description 6/6

All enemies that take damage from Annihilator’s flames have a 50% chance to catch fire. The burning units take 80000 damage and have their healing rate reduced by 15% for 2 sec. Steals 75% physical and magic armor from enemies hit by shards created by the Annihilator’s charged attack for 5 sec. When Annihilator deals a crushing blow, all enemies cannot use resurrection abilities for 5 sec.

Materials

Fiery Pepper
Magma Stone

Portal chest for dark souls

purchase in:
